questions: What is the patient's drug group? (Antipsychotics, Antidepressants, Mood stabilizers, Anxiolytics and hypnotics)
Does the patient have Renal Impairment? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Hepatic Impairment? (Yes/No)
Is the patient wandering aimlessly or exhibiting socially disorganized behavior in public? (Yes/No)
Is the patient willing to consent to admission? (Yes/No)
